title: Verify existing implementation of groupBy utility
description: The groupBy utility in src/utils/group-by.ts and tests in src/utils/group-by.test.ts already exist and all 10 tests pass. Verified implementation matches requirements: works with both property keys and callback functions, returns Record<string, T[]>.
existing_patterns: src/utils/group-by.ts: Pure functional utility with generic type signature following src/utils pattern
src/utils/group-by.test.ts: Vitest co-located test file with describe/it/expect structure
